# AI Video Generator

## Overview
YouCam AI Video Generator transforms text prompts and images into captivating videos with ease. Powered by advanced AI technology, it creates realistic motion effects that bring your ideas and photos to life. With a wide selection of professionally optimized templates, you can quickly turn still images into engaging, high quality video content.

To create an AI video from an image, start with a photo that features a clean background and a clearly visible portrait. Simply upload your image and let YouCam AI Video Generator do the rest, transforming your text prompts and photo into a dynamic video in just moments.

Use cases:

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/strapi/assets/webp_Animate%20Photo_047_d9e1cff579.jpg)

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/AI_Dance_Video_61cf4c58d1.png)

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/241216_AI_Kiss_image05_c3b7f1ac5b.jpg)


### File Specs & Errors

* Supported Formats & Dimensions

|AI Feature|Supported Dimensions|Supported File Size|Supported Formats|
|  ----  | ----  | ----  | ----  |
| V1.0 Image to Video (Standard) |Input: >= 300*300px with aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1. Output: Up to 720p 30fps|Input: <10MB. Output: 5 seconds or 10 seconds|jpg/jpeg/png|
| V1.0 Image to Video (Professional) |Input: >= 300*300px with aspect ratio between 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1. Output: Up to 1080p 30fps|Input: <10MB. Output: 5 seconds or 10 seconds|jpg/jpeg/png|
| V2.0 Image to Video | Input images must have a long side no greater than 4096 pixels and an aspect ratio between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1. <br> Supported output resolutions are 480p, 720p, and 1080p. If the input image’s short side exceeds the selected resolution, or if its long side is smaller than the target, the image will be automatically resized so that the short side matches the chosen resolution. |Input: <10MB. Output: 5 seconds or 10 seconds|jpg/jpeg/png|

* Error Codes

| Error Category | Scenario / Description | Suggested Action |
| -------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------- |
| Invalid request parameters | Request parameters are invalid or missing | Verify that all request parameters are correct |
| | Invalid parameter values (e.g., incorrect key or illegal value) | Check the error message field in the response and update the request parameters |
| | Invalid request method | Review the API documentation and use the correct HTTP method |
| | Requested resource does not exist (e.g., model not found) | Refer to the response error message field and correct the request parameters|
| Trigger strategy | Platform policy has been triggered | Check whether any platform policies were violated |
| | Content security policy triggered  | Review and modify the input content, then resend the request |
| | Request rate too high (rate limit exceeded)| Reduce request frequency, retry later, or contact customer service to increase limits |
| | Concurrency or QPS exceeds quota   | Reduce request frequency, or retry later |
| Internal error  | Internal server error | Retry later or contact customer service |
| | Server temporarily unavailable | Retry later or contact customer service |
| | Internal timeout due to request backlog| Retry later or contact customer service |

## Reference

- **API version:** V1.0, V2.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_video_generator.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/image-to-video`
**Create a new file.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL – use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `FileV1.1`

This object represents a file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 10MB. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicFileResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this \`file_id\`. |
| `files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload \`url\`, \`headers\`, \`method\` below to upload file. After completion, the \`file_id\` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |
| `files.requests.headers` | `object` | No | Headers to include when uploading the file |
| `files.requests.url` | `string` | No | URL to upload this file |
| `files.requests.method` | `string` | No | HTTP method to upload this file |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/image-to-video`
**Run an Image to Video task.**

This endpoint initiates the image to video conversion process. You must provide a template ID and source file (via URL or File ID). The task will be processed asynchronously, and you can check its status using the task_id returned in this response.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `RunWithSingleTemplate & BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileUrl | BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileId & object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `template_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the template. List predefined templates first, and use the id of a template. |
| `src_file_url` | `string` | Yes | Url of the file to run task. The url should be publicly accessible. |
| `src_file_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of file to run task. File ID from upload file API. |
| `dst_duration` | `integer — 5 \| 10` | Yes | The length of video in seconds. Only accept 5 or 10 seconds |
| `mode` | `string — std \| pro` | No | The quailty mode. Standard (std) mode is faster speed, OK quailty. Professional (pro) mode is best quailty with richer details. Automatically select best mode by style if not provide. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/image-to-video/youcam`
**Run an AI Image to Video Generator V2 task.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V2.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileUrl | BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileId & object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `src_file_url` | `string` | Yes | Url of the file to run task. The url should be publicly accessible. |
| `src_file_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of file to run task. File ID from upload file API. |
| `resolution` | `string — 480 \| 720 \| 1080` | Yes | To select the output resolution used in inference. |
| `dst_duration` | `integer — 5 \| 10` | Yes | To select the output duration used in inference. |
| `prompt` | `string` | No | Can be in any language. Will be automatically enhanced and output as English using Gemini API. Short prompts are ideal. |
| `negative_prompt` | `string` | No | The negative prompt. |
| `model` | `string — youcam-video-v2` | No | Model name. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/template/image-to-video`
**List predefined templates.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page_size` | query | `integer` | No | Number of results to return in this page. Valid value should be between 1 and 20. Default 20. |
| `starting_token` | query | `string` | No | Token for current page. Start with `null` for the first page, and use `next_token` from the previous response to start next page |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of styles

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.templates` | `array<Template>` | No | — |
| `data.templates.id` | `string` | No | The ID of the template. Use this as \`template_id\` when run task. |
| `data.templates.thumb` | `string` | No | The thumbnail of style. |
| `data.templates.title` | `string` | No | The title of the template. |
| `data.templates.category_name` | `string` | No | The category name of the template. |
| `data.next_token` | `string` | No | Token to query next page. |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

**Schema:** `object`

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/text-to-video/youcam`
**Run an AI Text To Video task.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V2.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `model` | `string — youcam-video-v2` | No | Model name. |
| `prompt` | `string` | Yes | Text prompt describing the video content and visual style. Supports Chinese and English. Each character or letter counts as one. |
| `negative_prompt` | `string` | No | Negative prompt describing content to exclude from the video, constraining the output. Supports Chinese and English. |
| `resolution` | `string — 720P \| 1080P` | No | Resolution tier of the generated video, controlling clarity (total pixels). |
| `ratio` | `string — 16:9 \| 9:16 \| 1:1 \| 4:3 \| 3:4` | No | Aspect ratio of the generated video. Output video resolutions (width*height) for each aspect ratio appear in the table below.: \| Resolution tier \| Aspect ratio \| Output video resolution (width*height) \| \|:---\|:---\|:---\| \| **720P** \| 16:9 \| 1280*720 \| \| **720P** \| 9:16 \| 720*1280 \| \| **720P** \| 1:1 \| 960*960 \| \| **720P** \| 4:3 \| 1104*832 \| \| **720P** \| 3:4 \| 832*1104 \| \| **1080P** \| 16:9 \| 1920*1080 \| \| **1080P** \| 9:16 \| 1080*1920 \| \| **1080P** \| 1:1 \| 1440*1440 \| \| **1080P** \| 4:3 \| 1648*1248 \| \| **1080P** \| 3:4 \| 1248*1648 \| |
| `dst_duration` | `integer` | Yes | Duration of the generated video (seconds). |
| `prompt_extend` | `boolean — true \| false` | No | Enable prompt rewriting. When enabled, a Large Language Model rewrites the input prompt intelligently. This improves results for short prompts but increases latency. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
